issues.description: B2+ pluperfect subjunctive 'hubiera sabido' and conditional perfect 'habría corrido' in A2 chapter
Sofia described with 'pelo rubio' but her visual_tag says 'long dark curly hair'
Switches to present tense 'camina/se sienta' when surrounding sentences use preterite
Diego appears but only Maria and Sofia are allowed in this chapter
References 'la playa' (beach) in a café chapter set in San Telmo
Sentence is B2+/C1 level: 'circunstancias geopolíticas', 'inexorablemente', 'fisonomía urbana' — far too complex for A2
Sentence has 20+ words, far exceeding A2 max of 12 words
Present tense 'se siente' when context is past narration
Perfect subjunctive 'haya podido' and pluperfect subjunctive 'hubiera cambiado' are B2+ in A2 chapter
Nonsensical causal chain: 'es importante que haya podido viajar para que hubiera cambiado' is logically incoherent
Scene jumps to beach ('corrieron hacia el mar') — chapter is set in a café in San Telmo
Ice cream vendor on beach — inconsistent with café setting
Maria wears 'chaqueta verde' but her visual tag has 'dark-teal cardigan' (not green jacket)
Says Maria has 'pelo negro y corto' but her visual_tag says 'wavy shoulder-length light-brown hair'
Physically impossible: 'tres maletas enormes del bolso pequeño' — three huge suitcases from a small bag
